name: Ata

skills.name: Child of the Sea
skills.description: Loss of life is temporarily stored in a gray shield form, during which 40%/15% of the equivalent gray shield of damage dealt to heroes/non-heroes is converted into blood, scaling up based on extra life. Basic attacks come with additional physical damage.

skills.name: Wavewalking
skills.description: Endeavor to jump up and deal physical damage to smashed enemies when you land. Afterwards, bounce up again, dealing the same damage as well as a 0.5 second knockback effect when you land. Immunity to control during the jump. When attacking multiple enemies at once, damage decays by 20% for each additional enemy, down to 60%. Increases damage to minions by an additional 30%.

skills.name: Sea Anchor
skills.description: Throw the anchor straight out to hit enemies in front of you, dealing physical damage and 60% slow for 1.5 seconds. If the anchor is embedded in a wall, Ata will use the force to dash himself and the enemy to that spot. When it hits the wall, it deals Physical damage and stuns for 0.5 seconds. [Passive]: after using [Anchor], the next basic attack within 3 seconds will pull the enemy back with the anchor.

skills.name: Ghost Ship
skills.description: Ata builds temporary terrain along the outer border of a fan-shaped targetarea, dealing damage to enemies within it.Gains crowd control immunity while using the skill.He can use the skill again to make the temporary terrain disappear early.

tips: Ata is a Easy Tank (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 54.1% win rate and 0.7% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Boots of Tranquility → Dragon's Rage → Blazing Cape → Eye of the Phoenix → Overlord's Platemail → Ominous Premonition.
Run Fate for stats that match Ata's Tank kit. Take Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Wavewalking → Sea Anchor → Ghost Ship → reposition. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for maximum damage and passive value.
Laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
Teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
Ata excels into Agudo, Meng Ya, Luara. Avoid blind picking into Jing, Wukong, Musashi without team peel.

Ata sits at Tier B globally (54.1% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.

faqs.question: Is Ata good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Ata is Tier B Tank with 54.1% win rate, 0.7% pick rate, and 0.1% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Niche — draft carefully.

faqs.question: What is the best Ata build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Boots of Tranquility, Dragon's Rage, Blazing Cape, Eye of the Phoenix, Overlord's Platemail, Ominous Premonition. Run Fate arcana with Execute. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Ata?
faqs.answer: Pick Jing, Wukong, Musashi into Ata. Deny Clash Lane resources early and force fights before Ata completes core items. Ata struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Ata counter?
faqs.answer: Ata is strong into Agudo, Meng Ya, Luara according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Ata when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Clash Lane lane.

faqs.question: Is Ata good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Ata sits at Tier B globally (54.1% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.

faqs.question: What lane should Ata play?
faqs.answer: Ata is tagged Clash Lane in Camp export (Tank). Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Ata?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Fate arcana. Battle spell: Execute. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Ata or Kaizer — which is better?
faqs.answer: Ata vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Ata has +2.7% WR vs Kaizer in Camp data. Choose Ata when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Ata?
faqs.answer: Low priority ban (0.1%). Focus bans on higher-tier Tank picks unless targeting a one-trick.
